subcodes.first_line: O Javád! Nabil hath attained the presence of Him Who was wronged. We have accepted what ye desired in the path of God, and have inscribed for you from My Most Exalted Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد قد حضر لدی المظلوم النبیل انا قبلنا ما اردتموه فی سبیل الله و کتبنا لکم من قلمی الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @praise and encouragement
